mission: Expose wrongdoing. Help humanity. Follow the documents. Map the system.
visibilityRule: Every automated maintenance run must be visible through a workflow log, generated report, artifact, commit message, issue, or public change log.
recommendations: No critical maintenance gaps found. Continue source expansion and live verification.

boundaries.speculation: Speculation is allowed when clearly labelled as speculation, hypothesis, motif, claim-history, open question or debunk lane. It must not be framed as proven fact unless source-grade records support it.
boundaries.maintenance: Every automated maintenance run must be visible through a workflow log, generated report, artifact, commit message, issue, or public change log.
boundaries.evidence: The core tracks public records, policy moves, mandates, pilots, contracts, court records, official releases, corporate filings, source-linked reporting, and clearly labelled speculation. It does not treat association, rumour, symbolism, or internet lore as proof.
